typography.h1: text-4xl sm:text-5xl lg:text-6xl tracking-tight leading-none font-bold text-primary
typography.h2: text-2xl sm:text-3xl lg:text-4xl tracking-tight leading-tight font-semibold text-primary
typography.h3: text-xl sm:text-2xl tracking-tight leading-snug font-medium text-primary

layout.spacing_scale: Generous spacing. p-6 or p-8 for containers, gap-6 or gap-8 for grids.
layout.dashboard_grid: Control Room pattern. grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4 gap-6
layout.card_style: Flat background, 1px subtle border (#E2E8F0), no default shadow. Hover: slight lift (-translate-y-1), shadow-lg, border-primary/20
layout.header_style: Solid background (white or deep blue #0F172A) with a hard bottom border, ensuring trust and clarity.

components.button_primary: bg-primary text-primary_foreground hover:bg-primary/90 px-6 py-3 rounded-lg font-medium transition-all duration-200
components.button_accent: bg-accent text-accent_foreground hover:bg-accent/90 px-6 py-3 rounded-lg font-medium shadow-sm transition-all duration-200
components.input: w-full border border-border rounded-lg px-4 py-3 bg-white focus:ring-2 focus:ring-accent focus:border-accent transition-all duration-200 text-primary
components.badge_trust: inline-flex items-center px-2.5 py-0.5 rounded-full text-xs font-medium bg-green-100 text-green-800 border border-green-200

pages.name: Landing Page / Home
pages.description: Startseite mit Login/Registrierung. Focus on trust and part-time jobs (20-80%).
pages.layout: Hero section with modern office background, Trust badges. Login/Register forms with tab switcher for Employer/Employee.

pages.name: Employee Dashboard (Arbeitnehmer)
pages.layout: Control Room grid. Profile summary, matched jobs list with percentage fit (accent color).

pages.name: Employer Dashboard (Arbeitgeber)
pages.layout: Control Room grid. Company overview, active postings list, applicant pipeline.

pages.name: Superuser / Admin Panel
pages.layout: Dense data table layout. High contrast, clear warning/success states.

accessibility_and_testing.data_testid: MANDATORY on all buttons, links, inputs, and interactive elements. Use kebab-case.
accessibility_and_testing.contrast: Ensure text contrast meets APCA/WCAG standards.
accessibility_and_testing.bilingual: Include DE/EN language switcher in header.

instructions_to_main_agent: Strictly follow the color palette (Deep Blue with Emerald Green accents) for a modern, trustworthy feel.
Implement bilingual support (DE/EN) with German as default.
Use standard HTML + Tailwind for landing pages, and customized Shadcn components for dashboards.
Make sure the AI Matching score is prominently displayed using the accent green color for high scores.
Ensure '20%-80%' part-time focus is visually highlighted as a key value proposition.
Include 'data-testid' attributes on all interactive elements.
